name: Dining Philosophers
generated_spec:
---- MODULE DiningPhilosophers ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES forks, states

(* Constants *)
N == 5

(* Helper functions *)
Left(i) == IF i = 1 THEN N ELSE i - 1
Right(i) == IF i = N THEN 1 ELSE i + 1

(* State definitions *)
Thinking == 0
Hungry == 1
Eating == 2

(* Initial state *)
Init == /\ forks = [i \in 1..N |-> 0]  (* 0 indicates fork is free *)
        /\ states = [i \in 1..N |-> Thinking]

(* Next state *)
Next == 
  (* Philosopher i picks up forks *)
  \/ \E i \in 1..N :
       /\ states[i] = Hungry
       /\ forks[Left(i)] = 0
       /\ forks[Right(i)] = 0
       /\ states' = [states EXCEPT ![i] = Eating]
       /\ forks' = [forks EXCEPT ![Left(i)] = i, ![Right(i)] = i]
  \/ \E i \in 1..N :
       /\ states[i] = Eating
       /\ forks[Left(i)] = i
       /\ forks[Right(i)] = i
       /\ states' = [states EXCEPT ![i] = Thinking]
       /\ forks' = [forks EXCEPT ![Left(i)] = 0, ![Right(i)] = 0]
  \/ \E i \in 1..N :
       /\ states[i] = Thinking
       /\ states' = [states EXCEPT ![i] = Hungry]
       /\ forks' = forks

(* Invariant: No two philosophers eat at the same time *)
NoTwoEat == \A i, j \in 1..N : i # j => states[i] # Eating \/ states[j] # Eating

(* Type invariant *)
TypeOK == /\ forks \in [1..N -> 1..N]
          /\ states \in [1..N -> {Thinking, Hungry, Eating}]

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<forks, states>> /\ NoTwoEat

name: Producer-Consumer Queue
generated_spec:
---- MODULE BoundedFIFOQueue ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANT K

VARIABLES q, head, tail, count

Init == /\ q = <<>>
        /\ head = 1
        /\ tail = 1
        /\ count = 0

Next == 
  \/ /\ count < K
     /\ head' = head
        /\ tail' = (tail % K) + 1
        /\ count' = count + 1
        /\ q' = Append(q, head)
  \/ /\ count > 0
     /\ head' = (head % K) + 1
        /\ tail' = tail
        /\ count' = count - 1
        /\ q' = Tail(q)

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<q, head, tail, count>>

name: Raft Leader Election
generated_spec:
---- MODULE RaftLeaderElection ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES currentTerm, votedFor, state

Init == /\ currentTerm = 0
        /\ votedFor = NULL
        /\ state = "Follower"

Next == \/ /\ state = "Follower"
        /\ currentTerm' = currentTerm
        /\ votedFor' = votedFor
        /\ state' = "Follower"
        \/ /\ state = "Candidate"
        /\ currentTerm' = currentTerm + 1
        /\ votedFor' = NULL
        /\ state' = "Candidate"
        \/ /\ state = "Leader"
        /\ currentTerm' = currentTerm
        /\ votedFor' = votedFor
        /\ state' = "Leader"

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<currentTerm, votedFor, state>>

name: Read-Write Lock
generated_spec:
---- MODULE ReadWriteLock ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets
CONSTANTS Readers

VARIABLES readers, writer_active

Init == /\ readers = <<>>
        /\ writer_active = FALSE

Next == \/ /\ writer_active = FALSE
          /\ \E r \in Readers :
              /\ r \in readers
              /\ readers' = Remove(r, readers)
          \/ /\ writer_active = FALSE
              /\ \E r \in Readers :
                  /\ r \notin readers
                  /\ writer_active' = TRUE
          \/ /\ writer_active = TRUE
              /\ writer_active' = FALSE

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<readers, writer_active>>

VARIABLE token

name: Simple Key-Value Store
generated_spec:
---- MODULE KeyValueStore ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS Keys, Values

VARIABLES store

Init == /\ store \in [Keys -> Values]
Next == /\ store' \in [Keys -> Values]
      /\ \E k \in Keys : \E v \in Values : store' = [store EXCEPT ![k] = v]

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<store>>

name: Paxos Single-Decree
generated_spec:
---- MODULE SingleDecreePaxos ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS N, M, V, Bool
VARIABLES Acceptors, Proposer, acceptors, proposers


\* Acceptors' state: [promise \in Nat, accepted \in [value \in V |-> Nat]]
\* proposers' state: [proposal \in [value \in V |-> Nat], chosen \in [value \in V |-> Bool]]

\* Helper definitions
acceptorState == [promise \in Nat, accepted \in [value \in V |-> Nat]]
proposerState == [proposal \in [value \in V |-> Nat], chosen \in [value \in V |-> Bool]]

\* Initial state
Init ==
  /\ acceptors \in [id \in 1..N |-> acceptorState]
  /\ proposers \in [id \in 1..M |-> proposerState]
  /\ \A a \in 1..N : acceptors[a] = [promise |-> 0, accepted |-> [v \in V |-> 0]]
  /\ \A p \in 1..M : proposers[p] = [proposal |-> [v \in V |-> 0], chosen |-> [v \in V |-> FALSE]]

\* Proposer's Prepare phase
Prepare(p, b) ==
  /\ proposers[p] = [proposal |-> [v \in V |-> 0], chosen |-> [v \in V |-> FALSE]]
  /\ b > 0
  /\ \A a \in 1..N : acceptors[a] = [promise |-> b, accepted |-> [v \in V |-> 0]]
  /\ proposers[p] = [proposal |-> [v \in V |-> b], chosen |-> [v \in V |-> FALSE]]

\* Acceptors' Promise phase
Promise(a, b, v) ==
  /\ acceptors[a] = [promise |-> b, accepted |-> [v \in V |-> 0]]
  /\ acceptors[a] = [promise |-> b, accepted |-> [v \in V |-> v]]
  /\ \A p \in 1..M : proposers[p] = [proposal |-> [v \in V |-> b], chosen |-> [v \in V |-> FALSE]]

\* Proposer's Accept phase
Accept(p, b, v) ==
  /\ proposers[p] = [proposal |-> [v \in V |-> b], chosen |-> [v \in V |-> FALSE]]
  /\ \A a \in 1..N : acceptors[a] = [promise |-> b, accepted |-> [v \in V |-> v]]
  /\ proposers[p] = [proposal |-> [v \in V |-> b], chosen |-> [v \in V |-> TRUE]]

\* Acceptors' Accepted phase
Accepted(a, b, v) ==
  /\ acceptors[a] = [promise |-> b, accepted |-> [v \in V |-> v]]
  /\ \A p \in 1..M : proposers[p] = [proposal |-> [v \in V |-> b], chosen |-> [v \in V |-> TRUE]]

\* Next action: either a proposer initiates Prepare, or an acceptor promises, or a proposer accepts, or an acceptor accepts
Next ==
  \/ \E p \in 1..M : \E b \in Nat : Prepare(p, b)
  \/ \E a \in 1..N : \E b \in Nat : \E v \in V : Promise(a, b, v)
  \/ \E p \in 1..M : \E b \in Nat : \E v \in V : Accept(p, b, v)
  \/ \E a \in 1..N : \E b \in Nat : \E v \in V : Accepted(a, b, v)

\* Type invariant
TypeOK ==
  /\ acceptors \in [id \in 1..N |-> acceptorState]
  /\ proposers \in [id \in 1..M |-> proposerState]
  /\ \A a \in 1..N : acceptors[a] = [promise |-> Nat, accepted |-> [v \in V |-> Nat]]
  /\ \A p \in 1..M : proposers[p] = [proposal |-> [v \in V |-> Nat], chosen |-> [v \in V |-> Bool]]

\* Specification
Spec ==
  Init /\ [][Next]_<<acceptors, proposers>>

====

name: Bounded Retransmission Protocol
generated_spec:
---- MODULE FileTransfer ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS MAX_RETRIES, CHUNK_SIZE, FILE_SIZE
VARIABLES ackedChunks, retransmitCount, sentChunks

    /\ file \in Seq
    /\ Len(file) = FILE_SIZE
    /\ chunks \in Seq
    /\ Len(chunks) = Ceiling(FILE_SIZE \div CHUNK_SIZE)
    /\ sentChunks \in Seq
    /\ Len(sentChunks) = 0
    /\ retransmitCount \in Seq
    /\ Len(retransmitCount) = 0
    /\ ackedChunks \in Seq
    /\ Len(ackedChunks) = 0

Next ==
    /\ \E chunk \in chunks :
        /\ chunk \notin sentChunks
        /\ chunk \notin ackedChunks
        /\ sentChunks' = Append(sentChunks, chunk)
        /\ retransmitCount' = Append(retransmitCount, 0)
        /\ ackedChunks' = ackedChunks
    \/ \E i \in 1..Len(sentChunks) :
        /\ sentChunks[i] \notin ackedChunks
        /\ retransmitCount[i] < MAX_RETRIES
        /\ sentChunks' = sentChunks
        /\ retransmitCount' = [j \in 1..Len(retransmitCount) |-> IF j = i THEN retransmitCount[j] + 1

        /\ ackedChunks' = ackedChunks
    \/ \E i \in 1..Len(sentChunks) :
        /\ sentChunks[i] \notin ackedChunks
        /\ retransmitCount[i] = MAX_RETRIES
        /\ sentChunks' = sentChunks
        /\ retransmitCount' = retransmitCount
        /\ ackedChunks' = Append(ackedChunks, sentChunks[i])

Spec ==
    Init /\ [][Next]_<<file, chunks, sentChunks, retransmitCount, ackedChunks>>

====
